mapper.sql: o.id, o.property_id, p.property_code, o.customer_id, c.customer_code, o.opportunity_code, o.opportunity_name, o.pipeline_stage, o.estimated_value, o.status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM opportunity o INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = o.property_id LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(o.opportunity_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(o.opportunity_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(o.pipeline_stage) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(o.status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%')) ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM opportunity o WHERE o.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(o.opportunity_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(o.opportunity_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(o.pipeline_stage) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(o.status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM opportunity o INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = o.property_id LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM opportunity o INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = o.property_id LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.opportunity_code = #{opportunityCode} AND o.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO opportunity (tenant_id, property_id, customer_id, opportunity_code, opportunity_name, pipeline_stage, estimated_value, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{customerId}, #{opportunityCode}, #{opportunityName}, #{pipelineStage}, #{estimatedValue}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE opportunity SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, customer_id = #{request.customerId}, opportunity_code = #{request.opportunityCode}, opportunity_name = #{request.opportunityName}, pipeline_stage = #{request.pipelineStage}, estimated_value = #{request.estimatedValue}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE opportunity SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
